title: NormalizedPrompt
description: Schema for a fully normalized engineering task produced by the prompt normalizer.

objective.description: Single, measurable objective for this task

business_context.description: Why this task matters to the business or users

project_context_needed.description: List of doc file paths the executor should read for context

scope_in.description: Explicit list of files/functions/modules in scope

scope_out.description: Explicit list of items explicitly excluded from this task

constraints.description: Hard rules the executor must not violate

assumptions.description: Assumptions the normalizer made in scoping this task

related_files.description: File paths relevant to this task (for executor context)

acceptance_criteria.description: Measurable, observable criteria defining task completion

logging_requirements.description: Specific log events the implementation must emit

review_checkpoints.description: Specific things the reviewer must verify

expected_deliverables.description: Concrete artifacts the executor must produce

risk_flags.description: Potential risks that the executor and reviewer should watch for

estimated_complexity.description: Rough complexity estimate to calibrate execution depth

raw_task_ref.description: Path to the originating raw task file for traceability
